subject: Re: Ranch Lake II and Ranch Lake III
body:
you're fine

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Each of the two corporations which purchased the
> majority of property on  the 
> Jelinek ranch that is not acquired to replace the
> Har Adom Property or the  
> Barretta Property needs to name a corporate
> secretary.  Is there any reason  
> that I cannot serve as the secretary.  Originally,
> we were keeping my name  off 
> of the two corps because I was associated with Mr.
> Morris and TM.  Does  that 
> still apply?  Would it not be possible that TM's
> lawyer agreed to help  you 
> out on this deal?  Please let me know if Rich can
> name me as secretary  of each 
> corp.  We need  to give this info to the Bank asap.
>  
>

body_html:
you're fine

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Each of the two corporations which purchased the
majority of property on the
Jelinek ranch that is not acquired to replace the
Har Adom Property or the
Barretta Property needs to name a corporate
secretary. Is there any reason
that I cannot serve as the secretary. Originally,
we were keeping my name off
of the two corps because I was associated with Mr.
Morris and TM. Does that
still apply? Would it not be possible that TM's
lawyer agreed to help you
out on this deal? Please let me know if Rich can
name me as secretary of each
corp. We need to give this info to the Bank asap.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022

Fax: 212-750-0381
